commit_scope: Clean another ideas read path from Python by binding a native source-backed curated portfolio route.

commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, urllib.request
with urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:19185/api/ideas/source-portfolio') as r:
    body = json.loads(r.read())
    print(r.status, r.headers.get('X-Form-Router'), len(body['ideas']), body['summary']['total_ideas'], body['ideas'][0]['id'], body['ideas'][-1]['id'])
PY
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py tests/test_ideas_graph_projection_form.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py tests/test_ideas_graph_projection_form.py
local_validation.summary: GET /api/ideas/source-portfolio now reads ideas/INDEX.md inside the kernel-router manifest and emits an IdeaPortfolioResponse-shaped curated portfolio for all 17 super-ideas. The route returns HTTP 200 with X-Form-Router:native-kernel and is counted as the 27th kernel-first capable /api route. The live DB-backed /api/ideas route still fans out to FastAPI.

known_limitations.observed: api/app/routers/ideas.py and idea_service still own mutable DB-backed reads, writes, language projection, scoring, and relation routes. This slice cleans the source-backed curated portfolio read path only.

cd form && ./validate.sh ../deploy/kernel-router/production-routes.fk currently stops on the existing source-language route-class helper outside this route. The Rust kernel-router serve + HTTP assertion is the behavior proof for the new route.
ideas/INDEX.md carries title, slug, pillar, stage, spec count, and capability; fields not present in source emit conservative IdeaWithScore defaults.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push of this source-portfolio route commit and GitHub checks on PR #2586.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy attempted for this native route slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: GET /api/ideas/source-portfolio is now a kernel-first capable route that reads ideas/INDEX.md and returns the curated super-idea portfolio response shape without FastAPI or idea_service. Existing /api/ideas behavior is unchanged.
test_flows: python3 runtime assertion -> 200 native-kernel 17 17 idea-realization-engine external-presence
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py tests/test_ideas_graph_projection_form.py -> 15 passed

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete; CI and deployment validation remain pending.
